item.title: Cryptocurrencies Graph price using a Raspberry Pi and 3.5” LCD Display
item.description: How to monitor Cryptocurrencies Graph price using a Raspberry Pi and 3.5” LCD Display

item.title: Multi cryptocurrencies price Ticker using Raspberry Pi and 3.5” LCD Display
item.description: How to monitor your favorite cryptocurrencies on a 3.5 inches LCD and any Raspberry PI!

item.title: Bitcoin And Ethereum price Ticker using Raspberry Pi and Display-O-Tron
item.description: How to monitor the Bitcoin and Ethereum price on a DisplayOTron LCD and any Raspberry PI!

item.title: BlockByte won Trust Square biggest blockchain Hackathon #SBHACK19
item.description: Last weekend I took part in the biggest Swiss Blockchain Hackathon #SBHACK19, and our team Lend-It won twice!
